calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And For Relief From Judgment Ccp. 437(B)
Off Calendar Aug-08-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Deputy City Attorney, Rafal Ofierski of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415-554-4244) appears as counsel for plaintiff/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Motion For Relief From Judgment pursuant to Section 437(B), Code of Civil Procedure is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff, City and County of San Francisco may file an answer no later than August 15, 2017. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Gordon F. Aiavao, CSR No. 11216, email: gaiavao@sftc.org. (D302)
